name: Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Raisins or other dried fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine all the dry ingredients and mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the liquid ingredients.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Do not overmix or beat.
6. Grease a non-stick 9x5x3 inch loaf pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning off the heat and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
This recipe appeared in Dr. Dean Ornish's Program for Reversing Heart Disease. Serving size = 1 slice, 191 calories, 0.6 grams total fat, trace saturated fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol.
